title: senna mollissima
intro: Senna mollissima, also known as Chinese senna, is a perennial plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the legume family. The plant's pods contain sennosides, which are anthraquinone glycosides with laxative properties. The medicinal properties of Senna mollissima include its ability to treat constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues due to its stimulant and purgative effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is used in teas, capsules, and extracts, offering health benefits such as regulating bowel movements and relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
